title: job-2
prompt: Primary request: Flat tech infographic, clay-orange (#d97706) and slate-gray (#1f2937) palette on warm off-white background (#faf9f5), bilingual zh-en labels, Inter-style sans-serif. Title: 'State Streaming · token 级双向状态'. Side-by-side comparison in two equal panels labeled 'BEFORE · 默认行为' and 'AFTER · StateStreamingMiddleware'. LEFT (BEFORE, desaturated, slightly grayed out): Top shows a LangGraph node timeline ending with TOOL_CALL_END, then a single large chunk labeled 'STATE_SNAPSHOT (full document)'; below it a UI card with a spinner and text '等好几秒… Waiting…'; a clock icon shows '~3-5s 延迟'. An annotation in red-orange: 'tool 跑完才一次性发完整文档  Full snapshot only after tool ends'. RIGHT (AFTER, vivid, highlighted with clay-orange glow): Top shows a LangGraph timeline where a TOOL_CALL_ARGS stream of small dots feeds diagonally down into a STATE_DELTA (JSON Patch) stream, which flows token-by-token into a live UI card where text appears typewriter-style one character at a time, with a blinking caret. A parallel TEXT_MESSAGE_CONTENT stream flows to a chat bubble. Both streams are labeled '并行  parallel' with a clay-orange equals sign. Annotation in green-orange: 'tool argument 流式灌入 state → UI 实时重渲染  Argument streams into state, UI re-renders per token'. Bottom code snippet in a small dark slate code box: 'StateStreamingMiddleware(StateItem(state_key="document", tool="write_document", tool_argument="document"))'. Clean dev-tool magazine aesthetic, no 3D, no photos, crisp readable text.
